notes: File implements the formal group of an elliptic curve (Silverman Ch. IV §1): the series w(z), its inverse i(z), the formal group law F(z₁,z₂), and the invariant differential ω, all by well-founded recursion over coefficient index. The main result formalW_recurrence (Silverman IV.1.1) is proved coefficient-by-coefficient in ~104 lines using the truncation lemmas and is consumed by LocalExpansion.lean. Several top-level defs (formalPoly, formalInverse, formalGroupLaw, formalDiff) are leaf wrappers with no properties proved in this file and appear to be dead code here, intended for downstream files.
